AC: 6
STR: +5
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL

Sarnak-Hide Mask
Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 6
STR: +5
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No

Tribute:96
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-25 10:22:48
Page Updated:Sun May 10th, 2015

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 913pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 40

Messed up on posted price
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2005 at 5:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1606090783103
242 posts
I just want to clarify that I bout it for 9 GOLD 1 SILVER and 3 COPPER from a bazaar merchant; not 913 pp.

Sent in an error report right away, but it might take some time for them to fix it.

Sorry about that.

BV

QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2002 at 11:49 AM Rating: Decent

20 posts
This mask is extremely common and worth getting (although i am a very unlucky roller heh heh).
▲ Page top
I hate this item
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 1:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768421929
View User Forum
47 posts
It might be ok for a lvl 40ish player, but I have had this for too long and really need somthing with more AC and str. I think Ill stick to fighting in Maidens Eye in hopes of scoring a Stone Visor.
▲ Page top
400pp?
QuoteReply
# Jan 26 2002 at 6:48 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773269740
118 posts
With some effort, you can get a cougarskin mask from Velious (NO DROP, for those PvP players).

Cougarskin Mask
--------------------
AC 6 Agi/Dex +2 HP +10
Most race/class Wt 1.0

Unless you are really weight sensitive and need the extra STR from the sarnak hide mask, I don't see how this mask costs that much. And from the other posts concerning about warrior having extra STR, they say that even 10 or 15 extra pts in STR don't really cause much significance for the tanks.

By the time you can camp this mask, cougarskin mask should be pretty easy for you to do. I got my cougarskin around 40.

So I am two cents poorer now.

Dali the lizzie SK
Vendetta Factor
Rallos Zek



▲ Page top
1500pp ??
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2002 at 8:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252237188
15 posts
Lets face it 1500pp for this is crazy. I believe people that put pricing in like that are the people hoping to find suckers to sell it to. I bought mine for 400pp on The Nameless server. Considering it's stats 400pp is a fair price for buyer and seller.

Dumb
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2001 at 6:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570674155
14 posts
Well don't I feel dumb! Was given one of these today in EC while trying to sell a Foci Robe I purchased for 600pp! Anyways I had no clue on its price and monk offered me 50pp for it and me being a poor cleric and more worried about selling the robe I sold it for 50pp! Man I wish I checked PC on it =( Send Smallboot a tell on Torvo server if ya want that foci robe
▲ Page top
nov 29, 2001
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2001 at 8:11 PM Rating: Default
Lamini
View User Forum
279 posts
hunting just skeletal captains...
after about 5 or so of them dead
they dropped nothing but these masks
At first we rolled, i won..
2nd all but me roll...
3rd... other 3 rolled
5th time... passing passing passing passing passing passing..
eventually we forgot about corpse and it rotted.
I sold my 7wis 7str face item for 500pp too to put this mask in its place. Not many face items with AC and STR in the face slot... but now that i see it sells for this much... i think i'll go back to KC
____________________________
Lamini http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=113217
Lamini's comeback: http://eq.magelo.com/profile/1399072

Bought this in EC tunnel of some cleric...neither of us knew the price, so we agreed on my proposed price of 60pp. Not a bad deal for me...not at all

price Bull SH%!
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2001 at 7:24 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591758644668
157 posts
I mean buy 2 mammoth meats get a high coulaty cougar skin and turn to that guy in iceclad. EZ :) same ac mask WITH HP ON IT :). Also even 20- can do that quest.
▲ Page top
RE: price Bull SH%!
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 1:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247003324
47 posts
Well, I might have to agree with you in one way, but the same I don't. In my opinion, 5 strength is better than 2 dex and 2 stamina, plus the mask weighs .4, instead of the cougerskin which weighs 1. Weight is very big for monks. Anyway, I really appreciate you pointing out the quest though. I think I need my 1k more than I do the strength and weight.
▲ Page top
This thing drops in multiple zones
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 6:54 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Two nights ago I was inspecting a level 20 some player. I was quite suprised to see all of his equipment was newbie stuff except for this Sarnak-Hide Mask. I asked him how he got it, cause I thought it only dropped in Karnor's. He said this was his first character, and he had been killing lots of sarnaks in Lake of Ill Omen and this dropped off one. At first I didn't believe him, but he wasn't a twink at all and he had no reason to lie about it. So this thing at least drops off skeletal captain and sarnaks in LOIO, not sure if it's all sarnaks though or just one type. He couldn't remember what type he looted it off of.
▲ Page top
RE: This thing drops in multiple zones
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2001 at 3:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247003324
47 posts
Well, he might not have been lying. Sometime I give mobs some of my leftover or weak equipment to leave the newbies suprises. Maybe he got lucky? = )

Umm no your wrong, only drops off of skele captain. Someone gave the sarnak that mask thats why he had it:)
